name: pga-marketplace
description: Paulo Alves' personal Claude Code marketplace — Engineering Manager tooling for OutSystems R&D

plugins.name: initiative-dashboards
plugins.description: Tooling for Engineering Managers and Product Managers to summarise the progress of an initiative or epic into a self-contained HTML dashboard. Walks Jira (epic + children + linked epics), enriches with GitHub PRs, Productboard, Confluence, and Google Sheets roadmap context, and renders an executive Progress Summary plus Recommended Actions.
